message.content:
Read the following files in /Users/yahelraviv/compass and report their full contents:

1. apps/web/app/(student)/layout.tsx - the student layout with the bottom nav
2. apps/web/components/session/SessionWizard.tsx - the full session wizard component
3. apps/web/components/session/steps/PrivacyReviewStep.tsx - privacy review step
4. apps/web/app/api/sessions/[id]/submit/route.ts - session submit API
5. apps/web/app/api/map/personalized/route.ts - personalized map API
6. apps/web/app/api/map/nodes/route.ts - map nodes API
7. apps/web/app/(student)/page.tsx - student home page (might have the "caught up" message)
8. apps/web/app/(student)/reflect/page.tsx - reflect landing page
9. apps/web/app/layout.tsx - root layout (for favicon/metadata)
10. apps/web/lib/ai-service.ts - AI service client

Report each file's FULL content with the file path as a header. This is critical - I need every line.

content.text: I'll read all 10 files in parallel.

content.content:
1→"use client"; 2→ 3→import { useState } from "react"; 4→import { Button, PrivacyToggle } from "@compass/ui"; 5→ 6→interface Reflection { 7→ id: string; 8→ promptText: string; 9→ responseText: string | null; 10→ isSharedWithCounselor: boolean; 11→} 12→ 13→interface Session { 14→ id: string; 15→ reflections: Reflection[]; 16→} 17→ 18→export default function PrivacyReviewStep({ 19→ session, 20→ onSubmit, 21→ onBack, 22→ submitting, 23→}: { 24→ session: Session; 25→ onSubmit: () => void; 26→ onBack: () => void; 27→ submitting: boolean; 28→}) { 29→ const [shareSignals, setShareSignals] = useState(true); 30→ const [sharedReflections, setSharedReflections] = useState< 31→ Record 32→ >({}); 33→ 34→ function toggleReflection(id: string, shared: boolean) { 35→ setSharedReflections((prev) => ({ ...prev, [id]: shared })); 36→ 37→ // Update in DB 38→ fetch(`/api/reflections/${id}`, { 39→ method: "PATCH", 40→ headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" }, 41→ body: JSON.stringify({ isSharedWithCounselor: shared }), 42→ }).catch(console.error); 43→ } 44→ 45→ return ( 46→

1→import { requireStudent } from "@/lib/auth"; 2→import { prisma } from "@compass/db"; 3→import Link from "next/link"; 4→import SignalSummary from "@/components/SignalSummary"; 5→import BreadthBar from "@/components/BreadthBar"; 6→import SessionCountdown from "@/components/SessionCountdown"; 7→import NotificationPreview from "@/components/NotificationPreview"; 8→ 9→export default async function HomePage() { 10→ const student = await requireStudent(); 11→ 12→ const [signalProfile, notifications, sessions] = await Promise.all([ 13→ prisma.signalProfile.findFirst({ 14→ where: { studentId: student.id }, 15→ orderBy: { createdAt: "desc" }, 16→ }), 17→ prisma.notification.findMany({ 18→ where: { studentId: student.id, readAt: null }, 19→ orderBy: { createdAt: "desc" }, 20→ take: 2, 21→ }), 22→ prisma.reflectionSession.findMany({ 23→ where: { studentId: student.id }, 24→ orderBy: { createdAt: "desc" }, 25→ take: 1, 26→ }), 27→ ]); 28→ 29→ const lastSession = sessions[0]; 30→ const now = new Date(); 31→ const currentMonthKey = `${now.getFullYear()}-${String(now.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, "0")}`; 32→ const hasCurrentSession = lastSession?.monthKey === currentMonthKey; 33→ 34→ return ( 35→
